title: Nucleic acid frameworks for structural determination
abstract: The present disclosure relates, in some embodiments, to the use of nucleic acid nanostructures for structural determination of targets such as proteins and other biological molecules of interest.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is:  CLAIMS I. An asymmetric or low symmetry nucleic acid nanostructure conjugated to a target. 2. The nucleic acid nanostructure of claim 1, wherein the nanostructure has a cylindrical or spherical shape. 3. The nucleic acid nanostructure of claim 1, wherein the nanostructure has a cylindrical shape. 4. The nucleic acid nanostructure of claim 1, wherein the nanostructure comprises 6-64 double-stranded nucleic acid helices. 5. The nucleic acid nanostructure of any one of the foregoing claims, wherein the target is a biological molecule. 6. The nucleic acid nanostructure of claim 1, wherein the target is a protein. 7. The nucleic acid nanostructure of claim 1, wherein the target is an RNA. 8. The nucleic acid nanostructure of claim 1, wherein the target has a molecular weight of about 200 kDa or less. 9. The nucleic acid nanostructure of claim 1, wherein the target is a nucleic acid binding protein. 10. The nucleic acid nanostructure of claim 1, wherein the target is a transcription factor. I I.
